const TENUES = [
  {id:1,g:"H",nom:"Tenue Imprimée Florale",cat:"Chemise",px:25000,desc:"Haut blanc à imprimé floral tropical multicolore, manches larges. Pantalon blanc assorti. Style moderne.",tags:["Fête", "Soirée"],img:"WA0115"},
  {id:2,g:"H",nom:"Chemise Perroquet Blanche",cat:"Chemise",px:22000,desc:"Chemise blanche boutonnée avec broderie perroquet coloré sur le torse. Coupe décontractée moderne.",tags:["Casual", "Fête"],img:"WA0113"},
  {id:3,g:"H",nom:"Ensemble Doré Abstrait",cat:"Ensemble",px:30000,desc:"Chemise à imprimé abstrait doré et noir, pantalon kaki assorti. Style sophistiqué et tendance.",tags:["Soirée", "Fête"],img:"WA0110"},
  {id:4,g:"H",nom:"Senator Beige Rayé",cat:"Senator",px:35000,desc:"Tenue senator longue en tissu beige avec détails rayés sur les manches et le col. Coupe africaine raffinée.",tags:["Cérémonie", "Mariage"],img:"WA0074"},
  {id:5,g:"F",nom:"Kimono Rayé Bleu Marine",cat:"Ensemble",px:28000,desc:"Kimono long à rayures bleues et blanches avec imprimé fleuri. Short assorti. Style moderne et chic.",tags:["Soirée", "Fête"],img:"WA0095"},
  {id:6,g:"F",nom:"Boubou Turquoise Géométrique",cat:"Boubou",px:42000,desc:"Grand boubou en tissu imprimé géométrique turquoise et noir. Coupe ample, manches papillon. Très élégante.",tags:["Cérémonie", "Mariage"],img:"WA0090"},
  {id:7,g:"F",nom:"Tenue Wax Bleu-Orange",cat:"Ensemble",px:26000,desc:"Ensemble 2 pièces en wax bleu roi et orange. Top col montant + pantalon large. Motifs circulaires.",tags:["Baptême", "Fête"],img:"WA0091"},
  {id:8,g:"F",nom:"Robe Dorée Manches Bouffantes",cat:"Robe",px:55000,desc:"Robe fourreau en satin doré avec veste courte à manches bouffantes noires. Tenue de gala luxueuse.",tags:["Soirée", "Mariage"],img:"WA0092"},
  {id:9,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Blanc Broderie Noire",cat:"Kaftan",px:48000,desc:"Kaftan blanc ample avec large broderie noire sur le col et les épaules. Coupe libellule majestueuse.",tags:["Cérémonie", "Mariage"],img:"WA0072"},
  {id:10,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Blanc Or Brodé",cat:"Kaftan",px:52000,desc:"Kaftan blanc en mousseline avec broderies dorées et noires élaborées sur le col. Coupe longue et fluide.",tags:["Mariage", "Cérémonie"],img:"WA0071"},
  {id:11,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Jaune Perles Dorées",cat:"Kaftan",px:58000,desc:"Kaftan jaune soleil avec col serti de perles et broderies dorées élaborées. Manches papillon en voile.",tags:["Mariage", "Cérémonie"],img:"WA0069"},
  {id:12,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Rouge Cristal Argent",cat:"Kaftan",px:65000,desc:"Kaftan bordeaux avec col et épaules couverts de cristaux argentés en motifs géométriques. Grand luxe.",tags:["Mariage", "Soirée"],img:"WA0065"},
  {id:13,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Rose Fuchsia Strass",cat:"Kaftan",px:70000,desc:"Kaftan rose fuchsia avec immense col strass argenté en éventail. Ceinture décorative assortie.",tags:["Mariage", "Soirée"],img:"WA0066"},
  {id:14,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Rose-Or Brodé",cat:"Kaftan",px:60000,desc:"Kaftan rose saumon avec broderies florales dorées sur le col et le buste. Manches longues bordure or.",tags:["Cérémonie", "Mariage"],img:"WA0062"},
  {id:15,g:"F",nom:"Kaftan Bleu Royal Or",cat:"Kaftan",px:62000,desc:"Kaftan bleu roi avec broderies en médaillons dorés sur le col et la poitrine. Finitions perles sur les manches.",tags:["Mariage", "Soirée"],img:"WA0063"},
  {id:16,g:"F",nom:"Collection Abaya Florales",cat:"Abaya",px:38000,desc:"Collection abaya à fleurs appliquées : orange, vert menthe et vert forêt. Ceinture et pompon assortis.",tags:["Cérémonie", "Quotidien"],img:"WA0058"},
  {id:17,g:"F",nom:"Boubou Bordeaux Batik",cat:"Boubou",px:32000,desc:"Grand boubou en tissu batik bordeaux à motifs feuilles blanches. Col en V avec bande contrastée noire.",tags:["Fête", "Cérémonie"],img:"WA0080"},
  {id:18,g:"E",nom:"Robe Fleurie Violette",cat:"Enfant",px:12000,desc:"Robe enfant à épaules dénudées, imprimé fleuri violet et vert sur fond blanc. Volants en cascade.",tags:["Baptême", "Fête"],img:"WA0078"},
  {id:19,g:"E",nom:"Robe Florale Fille Noire",cat:"Enfant",px:13000,desc:"Robe fille à fleurs roses et rouges sur fond noir, col Claudine blanc en dentelle. Coupe patineuse.",tags:["Baptême", "Cérémonie"],img:"WA0077"},
  {id:20,g:"E",nom:"Tenue Superstar Fille",cat:"Enfant",px:10000,desc:"Ensemble fille : top blanc 'Superstar' + jupe tulle noire à imprimés verts. Style moderne et fun.",tags:["Fête", "Quotidien"],img:"WA0076"},
];

// ── Palette ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const C = {
  bg:"#0F0A05", surface:"#1E1108", card:"#2A160A", cardL:"#361D0E",
  gold:"#D4A853", terra:"#B85030", cream:"#F5ECD7", dim:"#A89070",
  green:"#3DAA6A", red:"#D94040", blue:"#4A8CC4",
};
const STAT = {"En attente":"#D4A853","En cours":"#4A8CC4","Prêt":"#3DAA6A","Livré":"#666","Annulé":"#D94040"};

const CLIENTS0=[
  {id:1,nom:"Aminata Koné",   tel:"07 11 22 33 44",ville:"Dabakala",note:"Cliente fidèle"},
  {id:2,nom:"Fatoumata Bamba",tel:"05 66 77 88 99",ville:"Dabakala",note:""},
  {id:3,nom:"Moussa Coulibaly",tel:"01 23 45 67 89",ville:"Dabakala",note:"Fréquent avant les fêtes"},
  {id:4,nom:"Kadiatou Traoré",tel:"07 55 44 33 22",ville:"Katiola", note:"Préfère kaftan"},
];
const CMD0=[
  {id:1,cid:1,mod:"Kaftan Rose Fuchsia Strass",mes:"Tour de taille: 70cm, Poitrine: 90cm",dc:"2026-03-10",dl:"2026-03-25",px:70000,av:30000,st:"Prêt",nt:"Couleur rose fuchsia"},
  {id:2,cid:3,mod:"Senator Beige Rayé",mes:"Tour de taille: 85cm, Hauteur: 180cm",dc:"2026-03-15",dl:"2026-04-01",px:35000,av:15000,st:"En cours",nt:""},
  {id:3,cid:4,mod:"Kaftan Bleu Royal Or",mes:"Tour de taille: 68cm, Poitrine: 88cm",dc:"2026-03-20",dl:"2026-04-10",px:62000,av:25000,st:"En attente",nt:"Mariage 15 avril"},
];
const PAY0=[
  {id:1,cmdId:1,cid:1,mt:30000,dt:"2026-03-10",md:"Espèces"},
  {id:2,cmdId:2,cid:3,mt:15000,dt:"2026-03-15",md:"Orange Money"},
  {id:3,cmdId:3,cid:4,mt:25000,dt:"2026-03-20",md:"Wave"},
];

const fmt=n=>new Intl.NumberFormat("fr-CI").format(n)+" FCFA";
const today=()=>new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
const gid=arr=>arr.length?Math.max(...arr.map(x=>x.id))+1:1;

const CSS=`
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html,body{background:#0F0A05;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:#F5ECD7}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#D4A853;border-radius:2px}
input,select,textarea,button{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none}
@keyframes up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.up{animation:up .35s ease forwards}
.tap:active{transform:scale(.96)}
`;

const Row=({children,style={}})=><div style={{display:"flex",...style}}>{children}</div>;
const Col=({children,style={}})=><div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",...style}}>{children}</div>;
const Card=({children,style={},onClick})=><div onClick={onClick} className={onClick?"tap":""} style={{background:C.card,borderRadius:14,padding:14,marginBottom:10,border:`1px solid ${C.cardL}`,cursor:onClick?"pointer":"default",...style}}>{children}</div>;
const Tag=({text})=>{const c=STAT[text]||C.dim;return <span style={{background:c+"1E",color:c,border:`1px solid ${c}44`,borderRadius:20,padding:"3px 10px",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{text}</span>;};
const Inp=({label,...p})=>(<div style={{marginBottom:12}}>{label&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,marginBottom:4,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1.5}}>{label}</div>}<input {...p} style={{width:"100%",background:C.surface,border:`1px solid ${C.card}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"11px 14px",color:C.cream,fontSize:14,...(p.style||{})}} onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.gold} onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.card}/></div>);
const Sel=({label,children,...p})=>(<div style={{marginBottom:12}}>{label&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,marginBottom:4,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1.5}}>{label}</div>}<select {...p} style={{width:"100%",background:C.surface,border:`1px solid ${C.card}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"11px 14px",color:C.cream,fontSize:14}}>{children}</select></div>);
const Tx=({label,...p})=>(<div style={{marginBottom:12}}>{label&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,marginBottom:4,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1.5}}>{label}</div>}<textarea {...p} rows={3} style={{width:"100%",background:C.surface,border:`1px solid ${C.card}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"11px 14px",color:C.cream,fontSize:14,resize:"none"}}/></div>);
const Btn=({ch,v="gold",onClick,sx={}})=>{const bg=v==="gold"?C.gold:v==="red"?C.red:v==="green"?C.green:C.card;return <button onClick={onClick} className="tap" style={{background:bg,color:v==="ghost"?C.cream:"#0F0A05",border:"none",borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 18px",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,width:"100%",...sx}}>{ch}</button>;};

const Modal=({title,onClose,children})=>(
  <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"#000000CC",zIndex:100,display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",justifyContent:"center"}} onClick={onClose}>
    <div onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()} className="up" style={{background:C.surface,width:"100%",maxWidth:480,borderRadius:"22px 22px 0 0",padding:20,maxHeight:"92vh",overflowY:"auto",border:`1px solid ${C.card}`}}>
      <Row style={{justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:18}}>
        <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:20,fontWeight:600,color:C.gold}}>{title}</div>
        <button onClick={onClose} style={{background:"none",border:"none",color:C.dim,fontSize:22}}>✕</button>
      </Row>
      {children}
    </div>
  </div>
);

// ══ CATALOGUE ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function Catalogue(){
  const [gf,setGf]=useState("T");
  const [cf,setCf]=useState("Tous");
  const [det,setDet]=useState(null);
  const cats=["Tous",...new Set(TENUES.map(t=>t.cat))];
  const list=TENUES.filter(t=>gf==="T"||t.g===gf).filter(t=>cf==="Tous"||t.cat===cf);

  return (
    <div className="up">
      <Row style={{gap:8,marginBottom:14}}>
        {[["T","✨ Tous",C.gold,"#0F0A05"],["F","👩 Femme",C.terra,"#fff"],["H","👨 Homme","#1A4A8A","#fff"],["E","🧒 Enfant","#3DAA6A","#fff"]].map(([k,lbl,col,tc])=>(
          <button key={k} onClick={()=>setGf(k)} className="tap" style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 0",borderRadius:12,border:"none",fontSize:12,background:gf===k?col:C.card,color:gf===k?tc:C.dim,fontWeight:gf===k?700:400}}>{lbl}</button>
        ))}
      </Row>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",marginBottom:12,paddingBottom:4}}>
        {cats.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setCf(c)} className="tap" style={{flexShrink:0,padding:"6px 12px",borderRadius:20,border:"none",fontSize:12,background:cf===c?C.gold:C.surface,color:cf===c?"#0F0A05":C.dim,fontWeight:cf===c?700:400}}>{c}</button>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginBottom:12}}>{list.length} tenue{list.length>1?"s":""} disponible{list.length>1?"s":""}</div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {list.map(t=>(
          <div key={t.id} className="tap" onClick={()=>setDet(t)} style={{borderRadius:16,overflow:"hidden",cursor:"pointer",background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.cardL}`}}>
            <div style={{height:160,overflow:"hidden",position:"relative"}}>
              <img src={IMGS[t.img]} alt={t.nom} style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
              <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 55%,#2A160ACC 100%)"}}/>
              <div style={{position:"absolute",top:8,left:8,background:t.g==="F"?"#B85030CC":t.g==="H"?"#1A3A8ACC":"#3DAA6ACC",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,padding:"2px 8px",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>{t.g==="F"?"👩":t.g==="H"?"👨":"🧒"}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 12px 12px"}}>
              <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,lineHeight:1.3,marginBottom:6}}>{t.nom}</div>
              <Row style={{justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{background:C.surface,borderRadius:20,padding:"2px 9px",fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>{t.cat}</span>
                <span style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,fontSize:14}}>{fmt(t.px)}</span>
              </Row>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {det&&(
        <Modal title={det.nom} onClose={()=>setDet(null)}>
          <div style={{borderRadius:16,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16,height:260,position:"relative"}}>
            <img src={IMGS[det.img]} alt={det.nom} style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 50%,#1E1108EE 100%)"}}/>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:14,left:14}}>
              <Row style={{gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                <span style={{background:det.g==="F"?"#B85030":det.g==="H"?"#1A3A8A":"#3DAA6A",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,padding:"3px 10px",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{det.g==="F"?"👩 Femme":det.g==="H"?"👨 Homme":"🧒 Enfant"}</span>
                <span style={{background:"#0008",color:C.dim,borderRadius:20,padding:"3px 10px",fontSize:11}}>{det.cat}</span>
              </Row>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{color:C.cream,fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.8,marginBottom:14}}>{det.desc}</div>
          {det.tags?.length>0&&<Row style={{gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:14}}>
            {det.tags.map(t=><span key={t} style={{background:C.gold+"1A",color:C.gold,border:`1px solid ${C.gold}33`,borderRadius:20,padding:"4px 12px",fontSize:12}}>#{t}</span>)}
          </Row>}
          <div style={{background:C.bg,borderRadius:12,padding:16,textAlign:"center"}}>
            <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1.5}}>Prix de référence</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:28,color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,marginTop:6}}>{fmt(det.px)}</div>
          </div>
        </Modal>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ DASHBOARD ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function Dashboard({clients,commandes,paiements}){
  const totalCA=paiements.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.mt,0);
  const nonPaye=commandes.reduce((s,c)=>s+(c.px-c.av),0);
  const hero=TENUES[12]; // Kaftan Rose Fuchsia comme bannière

  return (
    <div className="up">
      {/* Hero photo réelle */}
      <div style={{borderRadius:20,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:18,height:220,position:"relative",border:`1px solid ${C.gold}33`}}>
        <img src={IMGS[hero.img]} alt="Hamed Traoré Atelier" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"linear-gradient(to bottom,#0005,#000A)"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:16,left:18}}>
          <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:24,fontWeight:700,color:C.gold,textShadow:"0 2px 8px #000"}}>Hamed Traoré</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#FFFFFFbb",letterSpacing:2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginTop:2}}>Couturier Styliste · Dabakala · Côte d'Ivoire</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#FFFFFFaa",marginTop:4}}>Mode africaine sur mesure · Kaftans · Boubous · Wax</div>
        </div>
        {/* Boutons contact rapide */}
        <Row style={{position:"absolute",top:14,right:14,gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>window.open("tel:+2250712539148")} style={{background:"#3DAA6ACC",border:"none",borderRadius:10,padding:"8px 10px",fontSize:18,cursor:"pointer"}} className="tap">📞</button>
          <button onClick={()=>window.open("https://wa.me/2250712539148")} style={{background:"#25D366CC",border:"none",borderRadius:10,padding:"8px 10px",fontSize:18,cursor:"pointer"}} className="tap">💬</button>
        </Row>
      </div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:12}}>
        {[{l:"Clients",v:clients.length,i:"👥",col:C.blue},{l:"Commandes",v:commandes.length,i:"📋",col:C.gold},{l:"En cours",v:commandes.filter(c=>c.st==="En cours").length,i:"⚙️",col:C.terra},{l:"Prêtes",v:commandes.filter(c=>c.st==="Prêt").length,i:"✅",col:C.green}].map(s=>(
          <Card key={s.l} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"16px 10px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:22}}>{s.i}</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:26,fontWeight:700,color:s.col,lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.dim,marginTop:2}}>{s.l}</div>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>

      <Card style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${C.terra}18,${C.gold}18)`,border:`1px solid ${C.gold}33`,marginBottom:16}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1.5}}>Caisse totale encaissée</div>
        <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:26,color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,marginTop:4}}>{fmt(totalCA)}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.red,marginTop:6}}>🔴 Reste à encaisser : {fmt(nonPaye)}</div>
      </Card>

      <div style={{marginBottom:16}}>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:10,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1}}>Catalogue ({TENUES.length} tenues)</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,overflowX:"auto",paddingBottom:6}}>
          {TENUES.slice(0,12).map(t=>(
            <div key={t.id} style={{flexShrink:0,width:72}}>
              <div style={{height:72,width:72,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${C.cardL}`}}>
                <img src={IMGS[t.img]} alt={t.nom} style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
              </div>
              <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:9,marginTop:3,textAlign:"center",lineHeight:1.2}}>{t.nom.slice(0,14)}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:10,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1}}>Commandes récentes</div>
        {commandes.slice(-3).reverse().map(c=>(
          <Card key={c.id} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:600,fontSize:14}}>{c.mod}</div>
              <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginTop:2}}>🚚 {c.dl}</div>
            </div>
            <Tag text={c.st}/>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ CLIENTS ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function Clients({clients,setClients,commandes}){
  const [modal,setModal]=useState(false);
  const [det,setDet]=useState(null);
  const [q,setQ]=useState("");
  const [f,setF]=useState({nom:"",tel:"",ville:"Dabakala",note:""});
  const list=clients.filter(c=>c.nom.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase())||c.tel.includes(q));
  const save=()=>{if(!f.nom.trim())return;setClients(p=>[...p,{...f,id:gid(p)}]);setModal(false);setF({nom:"",tel:"",ville:"Dabakala",note:""});};
  return (
    <div className="up">
      <Row style={{gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>
        <input value={q} onChange={e=>setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder="🔍 Rechercher un client..."
          style={{flex:1,background:C.surface,border:`1px solid ${C.card}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"11px 14px",color:C.cream,fontSize:14}}/>
        <button onClick={()=>setModal(true)} className="tap" style={{background:C.gold,color:"#0F0A05",border:"none",borderRadius:12,width:46,height:46,fontSize:22,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>+</button>
      </Row>
      {list.map(c=>{
        const nb=commandes.filter(x=>x.cid===c.id).length;
        return (
          <Card key={c.id} onClick={()=>setDet(c)}>
            <Row style={{alignItems:"center",gap:14}}>
              <div style={{width:46,height:46,borderRadius:"50%",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${C.terra},${C.gold})`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,fontWeight:700,color:"#0F0A05",flexShrink:0}}>{c.nom[0]}</div>
              <Col style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:600,fontSize:15}}>{c.nom}</div>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:2}}>📞 {c.tel} · {c.ville}</div>
                {c.note&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginTop:2}}>📝 {c.note}</div>}
              </Col>
              <Col style={{alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
                <div style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,fontSize:18}}>{nb}</div>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11}}>cmd{nb>1?"s":""}</div>
              </Col>
            </Row>
          </Card>
        );
      })}
      {modal&&<Modal title="Nouveau client" onClose={()=>setModal(false)}>
        <Inp label="Nom complet *" value={f.nom} onChange={e=>setF({...f,nom:e.target.value})} placeholder="Ex: Aminata Koné"/>
        <Inp label="Téléphone" value={f.tel} onChange={e=>setF({...f,tel:e.target.value})} placeholder="07 XX XX XX XX" type="tel"/>
        <Inp label="Ville" value={f.ville} onChange={e=>setF({...f,ville:e.target.value})}/>
        <Tx label="Note" value={f.note} onChange={e=>setF({...f,note:e.target.value})}/>
        <Btn ch="✅ Enregistrer le client" onClick={save}/>
      </Modal>}
      {det&&<Modal title={det.nom} onClose={()=>setDet(null)}>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13}}>📞 {det.tel}</div>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>📍 {det.ville}</div>
        {det.note&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>📝 {det.note}</div>}
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,marginTop:14,marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Commandes ({commandes.filter(c=>c.cid===det.id).length})</div>
        {commandes.filter(c=>c.cid===det.id).map(c=>(
          <Row key={c.id} style={{background:C.bg,borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:8,justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <Col><div style={{color:C.cream,fontSize:14}}>{c.mod}</div><div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12}}>{fmt(c.px)}</div></Col>
            <Tag text={c.st}/>
          </Row>
        ))}
      </Modal>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ COMMANDES ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function Commandes({commandes,setCommandes,clients,paiements,setPaiements}){
  const [modal,setModal]=useState(false);
  const [det,setDet]=useState(null);
  const [flt,setFlt]=useState("Tous");
  const [pm,setPm]=useState(false);
  const [payV,setPayV]=useState("");
  const [payM,setPayM]=useState("Espèces");
  const [f,setF]=useState({cid:clients[0]?.id||"",mod:"",mes:"",dc:today(),dl:"",px:"",av:"0",st:"En attente",nt:""});
  const sts=["Tous","En attente","En cours","Prêt","Livré","Annulé"];
  const list=flt==="Tous"?commandes:commandes.filter(c=>c.st===flt);
  const gcn=id=>clients.find(c=>c.id===id)?.nom||"?";
  const save=()=>{if(!f.mod.trim())return;setCommandes(p=>[...p,{...f,id:gid(p),cid:+f.cid,px:+f.px,av:+f.av}]);setModal(false);setF({cid:clients[0]?.id||"",mod:"",mes:"",dc:today(),dl:"",px:"",av:"0",st:"En attente",nt:""});};
  const upSt=(id,st)=>{setCommandes(p=>p.map(c=>c.id===id?{...c,st}:c));setDet(p=>p?{...p,st}:null);};
  const doPay=()=>{if(!payV||!det)return;setPaiements(p=>[...p,{id:gid(p),cmdId:det.id,cid:det.cid,mt:+payV,dt:today(),md:payM}]);setCommandes(p=>p.map(c=>c.id===det.id?{...c,av:c.av+ +payV}:c));setDet(p=>({...p,av:p.av+ +payV}));setPayV("");setPm(false);};

  return (
    <div className="up">
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",marginBottom:12,paddingBottom:4}}>
        {sts.map(s=><button key={s} onClick={()=>setFlt(s)} className="tap" style={{flexShrink:0,padding:"7px 13px",borderRadius:20,border:"none",background:flt===s?C.gold:C.card,color:flt===s?"#0F0A05":C.dim,fontWeight:flt===s?700:400,fontSize:12}}>{s}</button>)}
      </div>
      <button onClick={()=>setModal(true)} className="tap" style={{width:"100%",background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${C.terra},${C.gold})`,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:12,padding:13,fontWeight:700,fontSize:15,marginBottom:14}}>+ Nouvelle commande</button>

      {list.map(c=>{
        const reste=c.px-c.av;
        const t=TENUES.find(t=>t.nom===c.mod);
        return (
          <Card key={c.id} onClick={()=>setDet(c)}>
            <Row style={{gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              {t&&<div style={{width:56,height:56,borderRadius:10,overflow:"hidden",flexShrink:0}}>
                <img src={IMGS[t.img]} alt={t.nom} style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
              </div>}
              <Col style={{flex:1}}>
                <Row style={{justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,flex:1,marginRight:8}}>{c.mod}</div>
                  <Tag text={c.st}/>
                </Row>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:2}}>👤 {gcn(c.cid)}</div>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginTop:2}}>📅 {c.dl||"—"}</div>
              </Col>
            </Row>
            <Row style={{gap:16,marginTop:11,paddingTop:10,borderTop:`1px solid ${C.surface}`}}>
              <Col><div style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(c.px)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Total</div></Col>
              <Col><div style={{color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(c.av)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Payé</div></Col>
              <Col><div style={{color:reste>0?C.red:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(reste)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Reste</div></Col>
            </Row>
          </Card>
        );
      })}

      {modal&&<Modal title="Nouvelle commande" onClose={()=>setModal(false)}>
        <Sel label="Client *" value={f.cid} onChange={e=>setF({...f,cid:e.target.value})}>{clients.map(c=><option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.nom}</option>)}</Sel>
        <Sel label="Tenue du catalogue" value="" onChange={e=>{if(e.target.value){const t=TENUES.find(t=>t.nom===e.target.value);setF({...f,mod:e.target.value,px:t?.px?.toString()||f.px});}}}>
          <option value="">— Sélectionner une tenue —</option>
          <optgroup label="👩 Femme">{TENUES.filter(t=>t.g==="F").map(t=><option key={t.id} value={t.nom}>{t.nom} — {fmt(t.px)}</option>)}</optgroup>
          <optgroup label="👨 Homme">{TENUES.filter(t=>t.g==="H").map(t=><option key={t.id} value={t.nom}>{t.nom} — {fmt(t.px)}</option>)}</optgroup>
          <optgroup label="🧒 Enfant">{TENUES.filter(t=>t.g==="E").map(t=><option key={t.id} value={t.nom}>{t.nom} — {fmt(t.px)}</option>)}</optgroup>
        </Sel>
        <Inp label="Modèle / Description *" value={f.mod} onChange={e=>setF({...f,mod:e.target.value})} placeholder="Ex: Kaftan rouge..."/>
        <Tx label="Mesures" value={f.mes} onChange={e=>setF({...f,mes:e.target.value})} placeholder="Tour de taille: 70cm..."/>
        <Row style={{gap:10}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><Inp label="Date commande" type="date" value={f.dc} onChange={e=>setF({...f,dc:e.target.value})}/></div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><Inp label="Date livraison" type="date" value={f.dl} onChange={e=>setF({...f,dl:e.target.value})}/></div>
        </Row>
        <Row style={{gap:10}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><Inp label="Prix total (FCFA)" type="number" value={f.px} onChange={e=>setF({...f,px:e.target.value})} placeholder="0"/></div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><Inp label="Avance reçue" type="number" value={f.av} onChange={e=>setF({...f,av:e.target.value})} placeholder="0"/></div>
        </Row>
        <Sel label="Statut" value={f.st} onChange={e=>setF({...f,st:e.target.value})}>{["En attente","En cours","Prêt","Livré","Annulé"].map(s=><option key={s}>{s}</option>)}</Sel>
        <Tx label="Note" value={f.nt} onChange={e=>setF({...f,nt:e.target.value})} placeholder="Couleur tissu, remarques..."/>
        <Btn ch="✅ Enregistrer la commande" onClick={save}/>
      </Modal>}

      {det&&<Modal title="Détail commande" onClose={()=>setDet(null)}>
        {TENUES.find(t=>t.nom===det.mod)&&<div style={{borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14,height:160}}>
          <img src={IMGS[TENUES.find(t=>t.nom===det.mod).img]} alt={det.mod} style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
        </div>}
        <div style={{background:C.bg,borderRadius:12,padding:14,marginBottom:14}}>
          <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:18,color:C.gold,marginBottom:8}}>{det.mod}</div>
          <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13}}>👤 {gcn(det.cid)}</div>
          {det.mes&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>📐 {det.mes}</div>}
          <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>📅 {det.dc} → 🚚 {det.dl||"—"}</div>
          {det.nt&&<div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>📝 {det.nt}</div>}
          <Row style={{gap:16,marginTop:12,paddingTop:12,borderTop:`1px solid ${C.surface}`}}>
            <Col><div style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(det.px)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Total</div></Col>
            <Col><div style={{color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(det.av)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Payé</div></Col>
            <Col><div style={{color:(det.px-det.av)>0?C.red:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(det.px-det.av)}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim}}>Reste</div></Col>
          </Row>
        </div>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:11,marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Changer le statut</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:14}}>
          {["En attente","En cours","Prêt","Livré","Annulé"].map(s=><button key={s} onClick={()=>upSt(det.id,s)} className="tap" style={{padding:"7px 11px",borderRadius:20,border:`2px solid ${det.st===s?C.gold:"transparent"}`,background:det.st===s?C.gold+"22":C.card,color:det.st===s?C.gold:C.dim,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{s}</button>)}
        </div>
        {det.px-det.av>0&&(pm?(
          <div style={{background:C.bg,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>
            <Inp label="Montant (FCFA)" type="number" value={payV} onChange={e=>setPayV(e.target.value)} placeholder="0"/>
            <Sel label="Mode de paiement" value={payM} onChange={e=>setPayM(e.target.value)}>{["Espèces","Orange Money","MTN Money","Wave","Moov Money","Autre"].map(m=><option key={m}>{m}</option>)}</Sel>
            <Row style={{gap:8}}><Btn ch="✅ Confirmer" onClick={doPay} sx={{flex:1}}/><Btn ch="Annuler" v="ghost" onClick={()=>setPm(false)} sx={{flex:1}}/></Row>
          </div>
        ):<Btn ch="💰 Encaisser un paiement" v="green" onClick={()=>setPm(true)}/>)}
      </Modal>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ CAISSE ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function Caisse({paiements,commandes,clients}){
  const [flt,setFlt]=useState("Tout");
  const modes=["Tout","Espèces","Orange Money","MTN Money","Wave","Moov Money"];
  const list=flt==="Tout"?paiements:paiements.filter(p=>p.md===flt);
  const gcn=id=>clients.find(c=>c.id===id)?.nom||"—";
  const gmn=id=>commandes.find(c=>c.id===id)?.mod||"—";
  const byMode=modes.slice(1).map(m=>({m,t:paiements.filter(p=>p.md===m).reduce((s,p)=>s+p.mt,0)})).filter(x=>x.t>0);
  return (
    <div className="up">
      <Card style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${C.terra}18,${C.gold}1A)`,border:`1px solid ${C.gold}33`,textAlign:"center",padding:24}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.dim,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:2}}>Total encaissé</div>
        <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:30,color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,marginTop:8}}>{fmt(paiements.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.mt,0))}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,color:C.dim,marginTop:6}}>{paiements.length} transaction{paiements.length>1?"s":""}</div>
      </Card>
      {byMode.length>0&&<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>{byMode.map(x=><Card key={x.m} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"12px 8px"}}><div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12}}>{x.m}</div><div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:700,fontSize:14,marginTop:3}}>{fmt(x.t)}</div></Card>)}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",marginBottom:12,paddingBottom:4}}>
        {modes.map(m=><button key={m} onClick={()=>setFlt(m)} className="tap" style={{flexShrink:0,padding:"7px 12px",borderRadius:20,border:"none",background:flt===m?C.gold:C.card,color:flt===m?"#0F0A05":C.dim,fontWeight:flt===m?700:400,fontSize:12}}>{m}</button>)}
      </div>
      {[...list].reverse().map(p=>{
        const t=TENUES.find(t=>t.nom===gmn(p.cmdId));
        return (
          <Card key={p.id}>
            <Row style={{alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
              {t&&<div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:8,overflow:"hidden",flexShrink:0}}>
                <img src={IMGS[t.img]} alt="" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
              </div>}
              <Col style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:600,fontSize:14}}>{gcn(p.cid)}</div>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginTop:2}}>📋 {gmn(p.cmdId)}</div>
                <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:12,marginTop:2}}>📅 {p.dt} · {p.md}</div>
              </Col>
              <div style={{color:C.green,fontWeight:800,fontSize:18}}>+{fmt(p.mt)}</div>
            </Row>
          </Card>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ CONTACT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const PHONE = "+2250712539148";
const PHONE_DISPLAY = "+225 07 12 53 91 48";
const WAVE_URL = "https://pay.wave.com/m/M_OfXoINLDFRLm/c/ci/";

function Contact(){
  const actions = [
    { icon:"📞", label:"Appeler", sub:"Appel direct", color:"#3DAA6A", action:()=>window.open(`tel:${PHONE}`) },
    { icon:"💬", label:"WhatsApp", sub:"Message WhatsApp", color:"#25D366", action:()=>window.open(`https://wa.me/${PHONE.replace("+","")}`) },
    { icon:"〽️", label:"Payer Wave", sub:"Paiement en ligne", color:"#1BA8E0", action:()=>window.open(WAVE_URL) },
  ];
  return (
    <div className="up">
      {/* Carte identité atelier */}
      <div style={{borderRadius:20,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:18,height:180,position:"relative",border:`1px solid ${C.gold}33`}}>
        <img src={IMGS["WA0066"]} alt="Atelier" style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",objectPosition:"top"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"linear-gradient(to bottom,#0004,#000C)"}}/>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:16,left:18}}>
          <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:22,fontWeight:700,color:C.gold}}>Hamed Traoré</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#FFFFFFcc",letterSpacing:1,marginTop:2}}>Couturier Styliste · Dabakala</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#fff",marginTop:6,fontWeight:600}}>{PHONE_DISPLAY}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Boutons contact */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12,marginBottom:20}}>
        {actions.map(a=>(
          <button key={a.label} onClick={a.action} className="tap" style={{
            background:C.card, border:`1px solid ${a.color}44`, borderRadius:16,
            padding:"16px 18px", display:"flex", alignItems:"center", gap:16,
            cursor:"pointer", width:"100%", textAlign:"left",
          }}>
            <div style={{width:52,height:52,borderRadius:14,background:a.color+"22",border:`1px solid ${a.color}55`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:26,flexShrink:0}}>{a.icon}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:700,fontSize:16}}>{a.label}</div>
              <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,marginTop:2}}>{a.sub}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{color:a.color,fontSize:20}}>›</div>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Infos Wave */}
      <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,#1BA8E011,#1BA8E022)`,border:`1px solid #1BA8E044`,borderRadius:16,padding:18,marginBottom:16}}>
        <Row style={{alignItems:"center",gap:12,marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:32}}>〽️</div>
          <div>
            <div style={{color:C.cream,fontWeight:700,fontSize:16}}>Paiement Wave</div>
            <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13}}>Paiement en ligne sécurisé</div>
          </div>
        </Row>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13,lineHeight:1.7,marginBottom:14}}>
          Payez vos commandes directement via Wave. Envoyez votre reçu sur WhatsApp après le paiement.
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>window.open(WAVE_URL)} className="tap" style={{
          width:"100%",background:"#1BA8E0",color:"#fff",border:"none",
          borderRadius:12,padding:"14px",fontWeight:700,fontSize:15,
        }}>〽️ Payer via Wave</button>
      </div>

      {/* Localisation */}
      <Card>
        <div style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,fontSize:15,marginBottom:8}}>📍 Localisation</div>
        <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.7}}>
          Atelier Hamed Traoré<br/>
          Dabakala, Côte d'Ivoire<br/>
          <span style={{color:C.cream}}>Disponible sur rendez-vous</span>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>window.open("https://wa.me/"+PHONE.replace("+","")+"?text=Bonjour%20Hamed%2C%20je%20voudrais%20prendre%20rendez-vous")} className="tap"
          style={{marginTop:14,width:"100%",background:"#25D36622",color:"#25D366",border:"1px solid #25D36644",borderRadius:10,padding:"11px",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14}}>
          💬 Prendre rendez-vous sur WhatsApp
        </button>
      </Card>

      {/* Horaires */}
      <Card style={{marginBottom:0}}>
        <div style={{color:C.gold,fontWeight:700,fontSize:15,marginBottom:12}}>🕐 Horaires d'ouverture</div>
        {[["Lun – Ven","08h00 – 18h00",true],["Samedi","09h00 – 17h00",true],["Dimanche","Sur rendez-vous",false]].map(([j,h,open])=>(
          <Row key={j} style={{justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",paddingBottom:10,marginBottom:10,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.surface}`}}>
            <div style={{color:C.cream,fontSize:14}}>{j}</div>
            <Row style={{alignItems:"center",gap:8}}>
              <div style={{color:C.dim,fontSize:13}}>{h}</div>
              <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:open?C.green:C.dim}}/>
            </Row>
          </Row>
        ))}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══ APP ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
export default function App(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("home");
  const [clients,setClients]=useState(CLIENTS0);
  const [commandes,setCommandes]=useState(CMD0);
  const [paiements,setPaiements]=useState(PAY0);
  const prets=commandes.filter(c=>c.st==="Prêt").length;
  const tabs=[{id:"home",icon:"🏠",lbl:"Accueil"},{id:"clients",icon:"👥",lbl:"Clients"},{id:"cmds",icon:"📋",lbl:"Commandes"},{id:"cat",icon:"👗",lbl:"Tenues"},{id:"caisse",icon:"💰",lbl:"Caisse"},{id:"contact",icon:"📞",lbl:"Contact"}];
  return (
    <>
      <style>{CSS}</style>
      <div style={{maxWidth:480,margin:"0 auto",minHeight:"100vh",background:C.bg,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 18px 12px",background:C.surface,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.card}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",position:"sticky",top:0,zIndex:50}}>
          <Col>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',serif",fontSize:20,color:C.gold,fontWeight:700}}>Hamed Traoré</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.dim,letterSpacing:2,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Couturier Styliste · Dabakala</div>
          </Col>
          <div style={{fontSize:24}}>✂️</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,padding:"16px 14px 90px",overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {tab==="home"   &&<Dashboard clients={clients} commandes={commandes} paiements={paiements}/>}
          {tab==="clients"&&<Clients   clients={clients} setClients={setClients} commandes={commandes}/>}
          {tab==="cmds"   &&<Commandes commandes={commandes} setCommandes={setCommandes} clients={clients} paiements={paiements} setPaiements={setPaiements}/>}
          {tab==="cat"    &&<Catalogue/>}
          {tab==="caisse" &&<Caisse    paiements={paiements} commandes={commandes} clients={clients}/>}
          {tab==="contact"&&<Contact/>}
        </div>
        <div style={{position:"fixed",bottom:0,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",width:"100%",maxWidth:480,background:C.surface,borderTop:`1px solid ${C.card}`,display:"flex",padding:"8px 0 6px",zIndex:99}}>
          {tabs.map(t=>(
            <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} className="tap" style={{flex:1,background:"none",border:"none",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:2,padding:"6px 0",position:"relative"}}>
              {t.id==="cmds"&&prets>0&&<span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,right:"20%",background:C.red,color:"#fff",borderRadius:"50%",width:16,height:16,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>{prets}</span>}
              <span style={{fontSize:18}}>{t.icon}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.gold:C.dim}}>{t.lbl}</span>
              {tab===t.id&&<div style={{width:20,height:2,background:C.gold,borderRadius:1,marginTop:1}}/>}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
